name: Takeru Hibiya
description: Takeru Hibiya is Kyouya Sata's classmate from his middle school days. He goes to a nearby all-boys school.

name: Tine Chelc
description: She is the Master of Archer in the False Holy Grail War in Snowfield. Tine's people are an indigenous people who had apparently kept watch over the Snowfield region for a thousand years before, in the early twentieth century, they were driven out by the government and the group of magi looking to prepare the land for the False Holy Grail War. Tine participates in the War seemingly with the intent to return her people to their rightful place. She does not have a particular wish for the Holy Grail

name: Toshirou Kamiya
description: Toshirou, a young man suffering from poverty, discovers a glimmer of hope through Transfloration. After undergoing the surgery, he can now hear the voices of spirit blossoms.

name: Totomaru Minowa
description: As soon as he enrolled in the school, he tried to become the ruler delinquent in the class, but was quickly beaten down by the protagonist. Ever since then he has respected the protagonist and becomes best friends with her. A delinquent that doesn’t put on a front and gets on well with everyone, values spiritual bonds, and is always willing to help without asking for anything back. However, he’s also an idiot who doesn’t realise the protagonist is a girl, despite spending the most time with her.

name: Urie Sogami
description: __Height:__ 178 cm A demon. He is the vice president of Shikou Gakuen and is popular with the girls in school. His reputation is the elite inccubus.

name: Waka Kamikura
description: Kamikura Waka is a high school girl who has the eyes of a "God". Waka is originally from Saga prefecture, and came to Tokyo in the hopes of meeting a god. When she was in her third year of middle school, she suddenly received the eyes of a god for reasons unknown to her.

name: Wushi Yan
description: The deuteragonist of Thousand Autumns, he is the leader of the Huanyue Sect, one of the three demonic sects and the imperial advisor of Yuwen Yong, the emperor of Northern Zhou.

name: Yukikaze Mizuki
description: __Height:__ 155 cm A young Taimanin who represents the next generation of anti-demon ninja warriors. She wields the deadly Lightning Arts that have been passed down to her through her family, as her deceased father did before her—in fact, Yukikaze's lightning bolts are so powerful that she cannot control them on her own and must rely on a pair of special handguns as a focus. By generating bullets in their barrels, she can unleash devastating salvos of thunder that have earned her a nickname: the

name: Yuri Mariya
description: A part of the Japanese Magician's Society (History Compilation Committee) in an elite group known as the Hime-Miko. A miko with a strong Spirit Vision which allows her to obtain visions from objects. Originallly fearful of Godou due to her previous encounter with the Campione Marquis Voban. She later opens up to and falls for him, becoming one of his allies. Touma, her guardian often calls her "Princess."

name: Yuriko Aoki
description: __Pen name:__ Ko Aoki (蒼樹紅) Aoki is a manga creator who used to work for a shoujo magazine called Margaret Magazine​ until she was advised to switch over to a shounen magazine. Over at Shounen Jump, she worked with Nakai on her series Hideout Door. She usually bears a tough exterior and can come off as having a cold personality. description: Virgo Asmita is the Virgo Gold Saint in Lost Canvas. Asmita is blind (being called "the blind Saint"), and says his eyes maintain closed and he can't open them. Asmita has an introspective personality and practices Buddhism in the Sanctuary, something not accepted by Taurus Aldebaran. He does not consider Sasha as a good goddess as she is the sister of Alone and he has thought of betraying and killing her.
